FONTSCALERMOD-MODE.title: Font Mode
FONTSCALERMOD-MODE.hover.desc: Choose between percentage-based scaling or forcing every font to a fixed pixel size.
FONTSCALERMOD-FONT_SCALE.title: Font Size
FONTSCALERMOD-FONT_SCALE.hover.desc: Scales the majority of UI text up to 300% for improved readability.
FONTSCALERMOD-ABSOLUTE_FONT_SIZE.title: Fixed Font Size
FONTSCALERMOD-ABSOLUTE_FONT_SIZE.hover.d: Sets all captured fonts to this absolute size when Font Mode is set to Fixed.
